summary: Docs-only MVP-05 learning methodology doc-sync slice is sufficiently proven. The methodology is canonical under docs/product, human gates remain pending, downstream MVP-05/06/07/09/10/11/12 units are not marked complete, no runtime API/schema/UI scope is present, and fresh verifier scans plus verify_harness pass. Java-backed make verify is not feasible in the current shell because java cannot locate a runtime; the blocker is documented and non-blocking for this docs-only slice.

environment_limitations.detail: Fresh verifier reran java -version and the shell reported: Unable to locate a Java Runtime. Builder evidence already records make verify reaching backend Maven and failing for the same Java/runtime reason.

checks.detail: Fresh path scan excluding .agent/.git finds only docs/product/b2b-mvp/lemanapro/learning-methodology-v0.2.md.
Methodology exists, frontmatter contains status: accepted_with_human_gates, and first body heading is '# Этап 2. Методология обучения MVP' with no leading ё.
Methodology repo path references checked by the verifier exist.
Source-of-truth, product foundation, MVP/v1/v2 stage docs and Harness docs reference methodology v0.2 and key IDs/statuses.
Fresh contradiction scan found no stale root filename, 4-6/4–6 weeks, 52-week/52-недель, old pre/post wording or future-methodology wording in the checked canonical docs/Harness files.
status.json completed_ids excludes MVP-05/06/07/09/10/11/12; exit gates for those units are false; active sprint is docs-only.
status.json and evidence.json keep financial correctness, legal/tax, HR wording, reward operations and support answer policy as WAITING_HUMAN.
Fresh status/runtime scope check found no changed apps/packages/infra/scripts/content/tests paths and active sprint guardrails mark public API, schema and UI scope false.
Fresh verifier reran .agents/skills/stage-launch-proof-loop/scripts/verify_harness.py --stage-id mvp and all checks passed.
evidence.md/evidence.json map acceptance criteria, raw outputs, docs-only scope, API/schema/UI non-applicability and pending human gates.
